matcher_value: Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName=@('System','Application','Security'); StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-7); Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)kernel|hardware|machine check|disk|filesystem|i/o|corrupt|memory|out of memory|driver|module|network|timeout|connection|service|daemon|security|unauthorized|access denied|failed' } | Select-Object -First 300 TimeCreated,LogName,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4
